transcript.content: You are a helpful assistant with access to various tools. Use the tools provided to complete the task. Be concise and efficient. If you need to perform multiple steps, do them in sequence.

# Add Product to Shopping Cart

Navigate to the V8 Energy Drink product page and add the item to your shopping cart.

Product URL: https://sa-shopping-aa-1.chats-lab-gui-agent.uk/v8-energy-healthy-energy-drink-steady-energy-from-black-and-green-tea-pomegranate-blueberry-8-ounce-can-pack-of-24.html

## Requirements
- Navigate to the product page
- Add the product to the cart
- Verify the item appears in the shopping cart

### Error
Error: server: Chromium distribution 'chrome' is not found at /opt/google/chrome/chrome
Run "npx playwright install chrome"
